CustomField.description: Status of the Reconciliation Schedule: 1. Open- All newly generated schedules will be in Open Status by Default. 2. Completed- For a reconciliation performed but Invoice/ Credit memo pending, schedule will be in 'Completed' status. 3. Reconciled: On approval of Invoice/ Credit memo, status of schedule changes to Reconciled.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Status of the Reconciliation Schedule: 1. Open- All newly generated schedules will be in Open Status by Default. 2. Completed- For a reconciliation performed but Invoice/ Credit memo pending, schedule will be in 'Completed' status. 3. Reconciled: On approval of Invoice/ Credit memo, status of schedule changes to Reconciled.
CustomField.label: _Status
